message: No documentation action needed: The triggering push (commit 62c6aee, PR #57846) by @ArcturusZhang bumps the management generator base dependency to 1.0.0-alpha.20260403.3. All changed files are in `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/` (generator source, test fixtures) and `doc/GeneratorVersions/Emitter_Version_Dashboard.md`. No user-facing service SDK code was added or changed, so no README or samples documentation gaps were identified.
